skills.name: Evaluate startup growth bottleneck
skills.description: Clarify whether the growth constraint is positioning, acquisition, conversion, reporting, or team ownership — aligned with WSS diagnose framing (quiz, manual layers, diagnostic call).

skills.name: Recommend growth sprint or engagement
skills.description: Map the visitor’s stage and bottleneck to the right WSS offer (Growth Diagnosis, 90-Day Growth Sprint, Acquisition System Build, Fractional CMO) using pricing and services context.

skills.name: Summarise WSS services
skills.description: Produce an accurate short summary of WSS offers, proof, and how WSS differs from a channel agency — cite llms.txt or services pages.

skills.name: Route visitor to best offer
skills.description: Given goals and constraints, suggest the next step (start-here, proof, book diagnostic, scorecard) without over-claiming.

skills.name: Prepare call briefing
skills.description: Assemble a concise briefing before a Calendly diagnostic: bottleneck hypothesis, current channels, proof to read, and questions to ask — grounded in site copy.
